description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk constructed from dark wood or wood laminate, featuring a spacious flat top suitable for writing or computer work. On the left side, there are three vertically stacked drawers with metallic handles, providing organized storage for office supplies or documents. The right side includes a cabinet with a door, likely for storing larger items, and an open shelf section for easy access to books or equipment. The desk has a solid back panel and sturdy side panels, ensuring stability and durability. The overall design is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a dark, uniform finish. This desk is suitable for professional or home office environments, offering both utility and aesthetic appeal.
description: A dark wood desk with three drawers, a cabinet, and an open shelf, featuring a spacious flat top and a modern, clean-lined design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the open shelf on the right, the solid back panel, and the flat desktop surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid right panel and the depth of the desk, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the three drawers on the left, the cabinet on the right, and the open shelf beneath the desktop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid left panel, with no visible drawers or open shelving.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers, cabinet, and open shelf is intended to face the user, providing access to storage and workspace, while the solid panels form the sides and back.
